text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The space is meticulously designed—sterile and modern, yet inviting. The glass walls divide but also reflect, creating the illusion of infinite possibility. The "R + D" wall calls for inquiry and innovation. There is an undercurrent of purpose: this is a place where knowledge is constructed and exchanged. I feel as though my presence participates in the unfolding of potential—an observer poised at the threshold between contemplation and action.
